auth.roleChanged: Your role has been changed. Please log in again to continue.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

login.heading: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue
login.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

register.heading: Create an account
register.subtitle: Free registration · Takes less than a minute
register.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

elections.listSubtitle: Browse active elections and vote, or follow live results.
elections.noActiveAll: All elections have expired - you can see them below.
elections.comeback: Check back later or create a new election.
elections.mySubtitle: Manage the elections you created: edit, delete, or create a new one.
elections.noMyElections: You haven't created any elections yet
elections.allExpired: All your elections have expired - you can see them below.
elections.createFirst: Create your first election using the button above.
elections.editDisabledTitle: You cannot modify the election because it has already been voted on.
elections.confirmDelete: Delete election "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.
elections.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe the purpose of this election
elections.visibilityHelp: Choose who can find and participate in this election.
elections.privateElectionHelp: Visible only to you and invited people.
elections.closedElectionHelp: Only the creator and invited people can find and access this election.
elections.invitationsHelp: Invite existing employees manually or enter email addresses. Email invitations also work for people who register later.
elections.manualInviteHelp: Hold Ctrl (Windows) or Command (Mac) to select multiple people.
elections.noMatchingUsers: No registered users match your search.
elections.noRegisteredUsers: There are no other registered users to invite.
elections.privateEditHelp: This election is private. Existing participant invitations remain unchanged while you edit its details.
elections.noInvitations: No one has been invited yet.
elections.questionPlaceholder: e.g. Who do you vote for?
elections.optionsSectionSubtitle: Add at least two options for participants to vote for.
elections.questionsSectionSubtitle: Add one or more questions. Each question needs at least two options.
elections.optionImageInvalid: Choose a PNG, JPEG, WEBP or GIF image smaller than 2 MB.
elections.loadEditFailed: Could not load the election for editing.
elections.lockedByVotes: You cannot modify the election because it has already been voted on.

vote.confirmedMessage: Thank you for participating! Results update in real time.
vote.anonymousLabel: Anonymous vote — your identity will not be linked to the chosen option.
vote.alreadyVotedBanner: You have already voted in this election. Options are locked.
vote.expiredBanner: This election has ended and no longer accepts new votes. You can still view the recorded results.
vote.castFailed: The vote could not be recorded. You may have already voted.
vote.editingBanner: You are editing your answer. Choose a new option and submit the update.
vote.editUsed: You have already used your one allowed change (edit or delete).
vote.updateFailed: Your answer could not be updated.
vote.deleteFailed: Your answer could not be deleted.

declaration.politicSubtitle: This is a non-anonymous vote. Confirm your identity before submitting.
declaration.comercialSubtitle: This is a non-anonymous vote. Fill in the information below before submitting.

users.heading: User & role management
users.subtitle: Manage team access and each account's permissions.
users.pendingWarning: The selected changes would remove all admins. At least one Admin account must exist.
users.confirmDelete: Delete user {{email}}? This action cannot be undone.
users.noFilterResults: No users match the selected filters.
users.confirmBulkDelete: Delete {{count}} selected users? This action cannot be undone.
users.bulkDeleteError: An error occurred during bulk deletion.
users.loadFailed: Could not load the user list.

errors.emailAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.resourceNotFound: The requested resource was not found.
errors.invalidElectionType: Invalid election type. Accepted values are "Political" or "Commercial".
errors.tooFewOptions: An election must have at least 2 vote options.
errors.invalidDateRange: The end date must be after the start date.
errors.notAuthorizedToEdit: You are not authorized to edit this election.
errors.electionHasVotes: You cannot modify the election because it has already been voted on.
errors.notAuthorizedToDelete: You are not authorized to delete this election.
errors.invalidInvitationEmail: One or more invitation email addresses are invalid.
errors.invitedUserNotFound: One or more selected users no longer exist.
errors.invitationsRequireClosedElection: Invitations can only be managed for a closed election.
errors.notAuthorizedToManageInvitations: Only the election creator can manage invitations.
errors.electionNotOpen: This election is not currently open for voting.
errors.invalidOption: The selected option does not belong to this election.
errors.alreadyVoted: You have already voted in this election.
errors.voteNotFound: You have not voted in this election yet.
errors.voteChangeLimit: You have already used your one allowed change (edit or delete-and-revote).
errors.declarationRequired: A voter declaration is required for this election.
errors.incompleteDeclaration: CNP, full name and residence (county + address) are required for political elections.
errors.invalidRole: Invalid role. Accepted values are "Admin", "ElectionManager" or "Voter".
errors.lastAdminRoleProtected: Cannot remove the Admin role from the last remaining admin account.
errors.cannotDeleteSelf: You cannot delete your own account from the admin panel.
errors.lastAdminDeleteProtected: Cannot delete the last remaining admin account.
errors.userHasCreatedElections: This user has created at least one election and cannot be deleted. Change their role to Voter instead.
errors.userHasNonAnonymousVote: This user has cast a vote in a non-anonymous election and cannot be deleted. Change their role to Voter instead.
errors.userHasAnonymousVote: This user has cast a vote (their token was consumed) and cannot be deleted. Change their role to Voter instead.
errors.userHasDependentRecords: This user cannot be deleted because other records still reference them.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

network.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
network.connectionError: Network error. Please check your internet connection.
network.forbidden: Your account does not have permission to access this resource.
network.badRequest: Invalid data. Please check the form.

hero.subtitle: A secure space where communities vote, and every result remains transparent.

intro.label: A complete platform
intro.title: Organize elections that inspire trust.
intro.lead: Votex simplifies the entire electoral process: create the poll, invite participants, track attendance and publish verifiable results, all in one place.

capabilities.label: Designed for clarity
capabilities.title:
Everything that matters.
Nothing extra.
capabilities.feat1Desc: Choose between anonymous or nominal polls, with controlled access and protected sessions.
capabilities.feat2Desc: The dashboard updates live, so decisions can be tracked without reloading.
capabilities.feat3Desc: Important actions remain recorded for an easy to verify and explain process.

process.label: A simple path
process.title: From idea to result, without friction.
process.step1Desc: Configure the question, options, period and vote type.
process.step2Desc: Authenticated participants get the right access, without unnecessary steps.
process.step3Desc: Votes are securely collected, and results become immediately visible.

closing.title: Turn the community's voice into a clear result.
